findings.title: LDAP injection: untrusted input reaches search()
findings.message: Intra-file candidate: http input at vuln.js:2 may reach the ldap sink search() at vuln.js:3 through 1 hop(s). Tainted data concatenated into an LDAP filter/DN. Escape with the LDAP escaping API (ldap.escape / escapeFilter / escapeDN). Heuristic — verify the data actually reaches the sink unsanitized before trusting it.

findings.title: LDAP injection: search() sink (no source path found)
findings.message: Dangerous ldap sink search() at safe.js:2 that the cross-file taint pass could NOT connect to an untrusted source (orphan sink). Still worth a look — the source may arrive via a path the summary call-graph misses (framework dispatch, dynamic call, config). Tainted data concatenated into an LDAP filter/DN. Escape with the LDAP escaping API (ldap.escape / escapeFilter / escapeDN). Confirm whether attacker-controlled data can reach it before trusting it.
